session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 9378 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the provided arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Classify PR review feedback by filling in semantic fields from mechanical CLI output. 16→ 17→## Steps 18→ 19→1. **Run mechanical classification:** 20→ 21→ ```bash 22→ erk exec classify-pr-feedback [--pr <number>] [--include-resolved] 23→ ``` 24→ 25→ Pass `--pr <number>` if specified in `$ARGUMENTS`. Pass `--include-resolved` if specified in `$ARGUMENTS`. 26→ 27→ This returns JSON with mechanically pre-classified items: 28→ - **review_submissions**: PR-level reviews (classification: "actionable" | "informational" | "needs_llm") 29→ - **review_threads**: Inline review threads (pre_existing_candidate flag set for bot + restructured) 30→ - **discussion_comments**: Discussion comments (classification: "informational" | "needs_llm")
... [169 lines omitted] ...
104→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 106→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 144→ "error": null 159→## Error Case 173→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 191→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the PR feedback classifier with the PR number 9378:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Execute PR feedback classifier for PR 9378

session.tool_result:
{ "success": true, "pr_number": 9378, "pr_title": "Merge `erk wt create-from` into `erk wt create --from-branch`", "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9378", "review_submissions": [], "review_threads": [ { "thread_id": "PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc515TTh", "path": "docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md", "line": 34, "is_outdated": false, "author": "github-actions", "comment_preview": "**Audit PR Docs**: Inaccurate claim detected.

Claim: Source pointer `src/erk/cli/commands/navigation_helpers.py:359` and `:904`
Reality: `navigation_helpers.py` is only 385 lines; `same_worktree` ass", "is_bot": false, "pre_existing_candidate": false } ], "discussion_comments": [ { "comment_id": 4103665513, "author": "schrockn", "body_preview": "Plan Queued for Implementation

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 09:40:52 PT

No violations found. All Python code changes comply with dignified-python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL (Look Before You Leap) - No EAFP violations found
✅ Exception handling - Proper error boundaries at CLI level
✅ Path operations - No path.resolve() calls without exists() checks
✅ Imports - Module-level, absolute, no re-exports
✅ No default parameters - Functions follow standards
✅ Performance - No O(n) properties or magic methods
✅ 5+ parameters - Keyword-only arguments properly used
✅ Subprocess - All subprocess calls use check=True
✅ CLI patterns - Proper use of click.echo, sys.exit, error boundaries

### Files Reviewed
- : No violations (added --from-branch handling with slot allocation)
- : No violations (removed create_from_wt import)
- : No violations
- : No violations
- : No violations
- : No violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-21 09:40:52 PT**: No violations detected - PR consolidates create-from into create command with --from-branch flag

## ✅ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 09:40:50 PT

Found 0 violations. Code follows dignified-python standards throughout.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL pattern (look before you leap) - No EAFP exceptions used for control flow
✅ Variable locality - Variables declared close to use
✅ Pathlib usage - Proper `.resolve()` for path normalization
✅ Function call clarity - Clean, readable implementation
✅ Indentation levels - No excessive nesting

### Violations Summary
None detected.

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/cli/index.md`: 0 violations (documentation)
- `docs/learned/cli/wt-command-comparison.md`: 0 violations (documentation)
- `docs/learned/cli/wt-create-from.md`: 0 violations (file deleted - documentation consolidation)
- `docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md`: 0 violations (documentation update)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/__init__.py`: 0 violations (import removal)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py`: 0 violations (slot allocation implementation well-structured)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_from_cmd.py`: 0 violations (file deleted - functionality merged)
- `tests/commands/workspace/create/test_branch_conflicts.py`: 0 violations (test refactor)
- `tests/commands/workspace/create/test_branch_sources.py`: 0 violations (test fixture)
- `tests/commands/workspace/test_create_graphite_disabled.py`: 0 violations (test fixture)
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/wt/test_create_cmd_from_branch.py`: 0 violations (test refactor)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-21 09:40:50 PT**: All violations resolved. Refactoring consolidates create-from into create --from-branch with clean LBYL patterns and proper variable locality.
- **2026-03-21 09:39:25 PT**: No violations detected. Code follows dignified-python standards throughout (proper LBYL patterns, acceptable single-level ternaries, good variable locality).

## ✅ Test Coverage Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 09:40:54 PT

All source changes have comprehensive test coverage. No violations detected.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Source Files

| File | Status | Tests |
|------|--------|-------|
| `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py` | Modified | ✅ `tests/unit/cli/commands/wt/test_create_cmd_from_branch.py` (9 test cases) |

### Test Coverage

- **--from-branch flag**: 4 test cases (local branch, remote branch fetch, not found, trunk validation)
- **--force flag**: 2 test cases (force eviction, force-without-from-branch validation)
- **Slot allocation**: 2 test cases (already assigned, pool full)
- **Integration**: 2 test cases (branch conflicts with external worktrees, create with Graphite disabled)

All business logic paths tested via Layer 4 integration tests.

### Excluded Files

- `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/__init__.py` — import/registration change only
- `docs/learned/cli/` — documentation only
- `docs/learned/erk/` — documentation only

### Files Deleted

- `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_from_cmd.py` — Merged into `create_cmd.py`; test file renamed, not deleted
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/wt/test_create_from_cmd.py` — Renamed to `test_create_cmd_from_branch.py` with updated invocations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-21 09:40:54 PT**: All source modifications have test coverage; slot allocation logic comprehensively tested
- **2026-03-21 09:39:25 PT**: Consolidated create-from into create --from-branch; all new slot allocation logic tested

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 09:40:25 PT

No violations detected. All code changes follow erk conventions.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered

**CLI Category:**
- Command deletion patterns (removal of create-from command)
- Parameter handling and validation
- Help text formatting

**Testing Category:**
- Test file renaming and organization
- Test assertions for new behavior

**Documentation Category:**
- Documentation updates for command changes
- Index file synchronization

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `@patch|monkeypatch\.` - None found
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` - None found (no production code changes affecting this pattern)

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ **Removing a command without checking docs/learned/ for references** - Documentation properly updated (index.md, comparison doc updated, create-from.md deleted)
✅ **Removing a workflow command or CLI entry** - Command removed from __init__.py, no workflow references existed
✅ **Renaming CLI commands without checking workflow files** - No workflow file dependencies found
✅ **Command deletion without checking integration tests** - No gateway methods deleted, only command consolidation
✅ **Test assertions matching old behavior** - Tests properly updated for new --from-branch behavior

{"author":{"login":"github-actions"},"authorAssociation":"CONTRIBUTOR","body":"<!-- audit-pr-docs -->

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 09:42:18 PT

Found 2 violations across 1 file. 1 inline comment posted; 1 issue outside diff context noted in summary only.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Verbatim code blocks — None found
❌ Inaccurate source pointer line numbers — Found in `docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md`
✅ Duplicative sections — None found
✅ Drift risk — None found

### Doc File Verdicts

| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/cli/wt-command-comparison.md` | KEEP | 0% | 90% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md` | SIMPLIFY | 0% | 80% | 2 inaccurate source pointers |
| `docs/learned/cli/wt-create-from.md` | DELETED | — | — | 0 (removed) |
| `docs/learned/cli/index.md` | KEEP | — | — | 0 (auto-generated) |

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md:34`: Source pointer `navigation_helpers.py:359` is stale — file is 385 lines, actual call site is at line 243. Source pointer `navigation_helpers.py:904` references a non-existent line. *(inline comment posted)*
- `docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md:65`: Source pointer `navigation_helpers.py:931-939` references non-existent lines (file is 385 lines). *(outside diff context — fix manually)*

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/cli/index.md`: 0 violations (auto-generated)
- `docs/learned/cli/wt-command-comparison.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/wt-create-from.md`: deleted
- `docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md`: 2 violations (pre-existing stale line numbers)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-21 09:42:18 PT**: Audited 3 docs (1 deleted): wt-command-comparison.md KEEP, same-worktree-navigation.md SIMPLIFY (2 stale navigation_helpers.py line numbers — lines 359, 904, 931-939 don't exist in 385-line file)

session.assistant: Now let me fetch the inline comment details:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: gh pr view 9378 --json reviews -q '.reviews[] | select(.body != "") | {id, state, body}' 2>/dev/null | head -300

session.assistant: Let me get the inline review thread specifically:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: gh api repos/dagster-io/erk/pulls/9378/comments -q '.[] | select(.line != null) | {id, path, line, body}' 2>/dev/null | head -400

session.assistant: Let me get more specific information about the review thread:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: gh pr view 9378 --json reviewThreads -q '.reviewThreads[0] | {id, path, line, isResolved, comments: [.comments[0] | {author: .author.login, body}]}' 2>/dev/null

session.assistant: Let me use a simpler approach:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Generate and validate final JSON output
